summary: Completed frontend-only validation for SplitLink static prototype. Landing, signup role routing, live slug preview, onboarding connect, success state, responsive overflow, and data-testid coverage were tested and passed.
action_items: No blocking frontend issues found in tested scope.
Optional code quality improvement: split /app/frontend/styles.css (794 lines) into smaller focused files.
critical_code_review_comments: File size concern: /app/frontend/styles.css is >700 lines and should be modularized for maintainability.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Used browser automation against http://localhost:3000. Verified all requested routes and role flows: /, /signup?role=merchant, /signup?role=affiliate, /onboarding?role=merchant, /onboarding/success?role=merchant. Desktop and mobile overflow checks returned false. No visible interactive elements missing data-testid.
rca of the issue: No functional bug reproduced in requested frontend scope.
test_credentials: Missing: /app/memory/test_credentials.md not found (no auth credential-dependent test was required for this static flow).
